# dig

> Open, local, reversible **knowledge-base layer for AI agents**. A Go CLI over a content-addressed store: organize a knowledge base to a declarative policy, retrieve it fast (deterministic full-text + opt-in semantic/hybrid), and reconcile drift — every mutation journaled and `undo`-able. A KB kept this clean doubles as agent memory that doesn't rot: it serves recall, never answers. Local-first and offline by default; AI is an opt-in layer that only ever proposes through the same reversible spine.

Key facts:
- Language: Go (`cmd/dig`, `internal/`). Pure-Go, CGO-free, single static binary.
- Store: BLAKE3 content-addressed blobs + bbolt manifests + journal. Search: SQLite FTS5 (pure-Go), rebuilt from manifests. Optional vector index in `.dig/vectors.db`.
- Retrieval: `dig find --mode fts|vector|hybrid`. FTS is the default; vector/hybrid (RRF fusion) opt in via a `[retrieval]` policy and any OpenAI-compatible embedding endpoint. Background-indexed, resumable.
- Benchmarks (through the real pipeline, fully local): LongMemEval-S full 500q hybrid hit@5 **98.0%** (vs published 96.6%); LoCoMo recall@5 85.3%; BEAM 128K tier published. See `docs/evals.md`.
- License: MIT. Status: pre-1.0, private, under active development.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/vllnt/dig/blob/main/README.md): concept, install, quick start, command reference, policy, stack
- [Architecture](https://github.com/vllnt/dig/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): content store, reconcile loop, concurrency state machine, AI layer, semantic retrieval
- [Extensions](https://github.com/vllnt/dig/blob/main/docs/extensions.md): 8 typed extension seams × 4 transport tiers, capability model
- [Landscape](https://github.com/vllnt/dig/blob/main/docs/landscape.md): prior art, competitive positioning, extensibility models
- [Evals](https://github.com/vllnt/dig/blob/main/docs/evals.md): benchmark methodology + scoreboards (LongMemEval, LoCoMo, BEAM)
- [Roadmap](https://github.com/vllnt/dig/blob/main/ROADMAP.md): phased plan, outcome-slug task IDs

## Contributing

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/vllnt/dig/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): build, test gate, conventions, workflow
- [AGENTS](https://github.com/vllnt/dig/blob/main/AGENTS.md): canonical instructions for AI agents working in the repo
- [Security](https://github.com/vllnt/dig/blob/main/SECURITY.md): private vulnerability reporting
- [Changelog](https://github.com/vllnt/dig/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): notable changes
